title: Architect network infrastructure in Azure
summary: Learn how to architect a secure, flexible, network infrastructure in Azure and connect on-premises networks to your Azure resources.

sections.title: Architect network infrastructure in Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to architect a secure, flexible, network infrastructure in Azure and connect on-premises networks to your Azure resources.

lessons.title: Secure and isolate access to Azure resources by using network security groups and service endpoints
lessons.content_md:
Find out how Azure network security groups and service endpoints help you secure your virtual machines and Azure services from unauthorized network access.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-and-isolate-with-nsg-and-service-endpoints/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure and isolate access to Azure resources by using network security groups and service endpoints

lessons.title: Manage and control traffic flow in your Azure deployment with routes
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to control Azure virtual network traffic by implementing custom routes.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/control-network-traffic-flow-with-routes/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage and control traffic flow in your Azure deployment with routes

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Architect network infrastructure in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Architect network infrastructure in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
